summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 8 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 25 — we need to reverse this today. Well below the 7-day average of 45 — the team is making real progress. 16 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 32 days past due with 8 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $15,006 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 20 days past due with 6 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 5 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **19 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. 3 payment tasks due this week.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $28,817 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 7 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Milagros Porturas:** Down to 4 overdue — making progress.

150 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **75 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 12 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$60,448 in payments going out this week** across 32 tasks — make sure funds are available. $10,506 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Katie Holmes & Sean Springs and Kyle Aubry - Project 01 — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 7. This needs to turn around today.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 5 overdue (oldest: 7d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 22 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 2 overdue — oldest first. 1 upcoming unassigned. 13 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 33 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 2. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 8 overdue (oldest: 32d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **10 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 2 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 4. Keep the momentum going.

**Ginger Brown:** 6 overdue (oldest: 20d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 2 overdue — oldest first. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **19 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 21 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 24 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
